title: stelis cundinamarcae
intro: Stelis cundinamarcae, also known as the "yellow orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family native to Colombia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis cundinamarcae include its potential to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. The herbal preparations of Stelis cundinamarcae typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots or leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or ointments.
